title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: the easiest way to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other open LLMs locally via a single CLI or REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, and list local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama: drop-in LLM, chat, and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama—chat interface, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints.

title: open-webui/open-webui
summary: Successor to ollama-webui; open-source ChatGPT-style interface for Ollama and OpenAI endpoints.

title: ollama-cli-copilot
summary: Lightweight CLI copilot powered by Ollama—inline code suggestions and shell helpers.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-copilot.vim
summary: Experimental Vim plugin that swaps GitHub Copilot backend for local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama and its CUDA runtime for reproducible local deployments.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model; slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama—mentions trigger local LLM replies with rate limiting.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete and summarization via local Ollama models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama—sync/async APIs, streaming, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama with tokio-based async client and strong typing.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama—chat, generate, and list models with built-in DI extensions.

title: ollama-rust-api
summary: Community Rust crate focusing on low-level REST bindings and model management.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes.

title: ollama-gpt-researcher
summary: Fork of GPT-Researcher that replaces OpenAI with local Ollama models for autonomous research reports.
